page_title: Attack on Titan 2: Mirai no Zahyō
text:
is a game developed by for the . It runs parallel to Season 2 of the anime with an additional world mode for army creation and base crafting. This game, however, hasn't had an official English release, and will almost surely never get one, due to the priority of newer Attack on Titan games and the discontinuing of 3DS manufacturing.
